sre_commands.intro.title: StarRailExpress Command Reference
sre_commands.intro.desc: All commands registered by this mod, grouped by namespace. Permission levels: 2=OP, 3=Admin, 4=Owner.
sre_commands.help.overview_hint: Click a category to expand, or run /sre:help <category>.
sre_commands.help.category_hint: Click a command to put it in your chat box.
sre_commands.sre.help.name: Help
sre_commands.sre.help.desc: List all StarRailExpress commands by category; click a category to expand.
sre_commands.tmm.start.name: Start Game
sre_commands.tmm.start.desc: Start the given game mode, optionally forcing all players to join and setting a start time in minutes.
sre_commands.tmm.stop.name: Stop Game
sre_commands.tmm.stop.desc: Stop the currently running game; use 'force' to stop immediately.
sre_commands.tmm.config.name: Runtime Config
sre_commands.tmm.config.desc: Inspect and edit SRE/Harpy/Noelle config at runtime, reload, reset, set the current round or toggle auto train reset.
sre_commands.tmm.afk.name: AFK Management
sre_commands.tmm.afk.desc: Manage the AFK detection system: reset the timer, check status, or set AFK time for yourself or others.
sre_commands.tmm.money.name: Money
sre_commands.tmm.money.desc: Get, set, or add a player's coin balance.
sre_commands.tmm.mood.name: Mood (SAN)
sre_commands.tmm.mood.desc: Get or set a player's mood (sanity) value between 0.0 and 1.0.
sre_commands.tmm.autostart.name: Auto Start
sre_commands.tmm.autostart.desc: Set a countdown (0-60s) to automatically start the game; 0 disables it.
sre_commands.tmm.votemap.name: Map Vote
sre_commands.tmm.votemap.desc: Run a map vote and control it: status, pause, resume, stop, or set the preset game mode.
sre_commands.tmm.switchmap.name: Switch Map
sre_commands.tmm.switchmap.desc: Switch the server map: load, list, pick a random map, or scan all available maps.
sre_commands.tmm.fourthroom.name: Fourth Room
sre_commands.tmm.fourthroom.desc: Manage the Fourth Room card game mode: view status, play cards, buy items, end turn, and more.
sre_commands.tmm.createpoint.name: Create Waypoint
sre_commands.tmm.createpoint.desc: Create a waypoint at a position using the 'path/name' format.
sre_commands.tmm.togglewaypoints.name: Toggle Waypoints
sre_commands.tmm.togglewaypoints.desc: Admin toggle for waypoint visibility, per player, path, or globally.
sre_commands.tmm.showstats.name: Show Stats
sre_commands.tmm.showstats.desc: Show your own game statistics, or another player's (requires permission).
sre_commands.tmm.showselectedmapui.name: Show Selected Map UI
sre_commands.tmm.showselectedmapui.desc: Display the vote UI for the currently selected map.
sre_commands.tmm.netstats.name: Network Stats
sre_commands.tmm.netstats.desc: Monitor server network traffic: global/per-player stats, packet rankings, and JSON export.
sre_commands.tmm.giveroomkey.name: Give Room Key
sre_commands.tmm.giveroomkey.desc: Give the executor a key item for the named room.
sre_commands.tmm.participate.name: Participation
sre_commands.tmm.participate.desc: Manage whether you join the next round: join, leave, toggle, or check status.
sre_commands.tmm.entity_interact_cmd.des: Attach custom persistent string data to selected entities.
sre_commands.tmm.reload.name: Reload
sre_commands.tmm.reload.desc: Reload the default ready area or the vote map configuration.
sre_commands.tmm.skinsync.name: Skin Sync
sre_commands.tmm.skinsync.desc: Manage remote item-skin synchronization: configure the server, sync, pull, enable or disable.
sre_commands.tmm.skins.name: Skins
sre_commands.tmm.skins.desc: Manage item skins and view a player's equipped skins.
sre_commands.tmm.game.name: Game Utilities
sre_commands.tmm.game.desc: Aggregate command group for in-game control: visuals, timer, penalty, roles, events and more.
sre_commands.forceteam.name: Force Team
sre_commands.forceteam.desc: Force players onto a faction (innocent, neutral, killer, vigilante) or reset their team weight.
sre_commands.listgameroles.name: List Game Roles
sre_commands.listgameroles.desc: List the role and modifiers of every player in the current round.
sre_commands.stop_when_over.name: Auto Shutdown
sre_commands.stop_when_over.desc: Toggle automatic server shutdown once the running game ends.
sre_commands.sre.narrator.name: Narrator
sre_commands.sre.narrator.desc: Send a TTS narrator voice line to selected players, optionally interrupting the current one.
sre_commands.sre.custom_replay.name: Custom Replay Event
sre_commands.sre.custom_replay.desc: Record a custom (or hidden) event marker into the game replay.
sre_commands.sre.show_replay.name: Show Replay
sre_commands.sre.show_replay.desc: Show the generated game replay to players.
sre_commands.sre.replay_screen.name: Replay Screen
sre_commands.sre.replay_screen.desc: Manage large replay display screens: create, remove, list, set default, or show.
sre_commands.sre.kick.name: Kick
sre_commands.sre.kick.desc: Kick the targeted non-OP players, with an optional reason.
sre_commands.sre.shield.name: Shield Management
sre_commands.sre.shield.desc: Unified management of normal/timed/weak shields: sre:shield <normal|timed|weak> <add|set|get|clear> [args] [targets]. Timed shields take an extra duration (seconds) and whether to reset the timer and stack; weak shields take an extra duration (seconds) and the death reason to block (* for any).
sre_commands.sre.poison.name: Poison Management
sre_commands.sre.poison.desc: Give/remove/trigger real or fake poison for players: sre:poison <normal|fake> <set|get|clear|trigger> [ticks] [targets]. set takes game ticks (1s=20 ticks); clear removes it directly; trigger instantly triggers the current poison and kills (fake poison also kills).
sre_commands.sre.stamina.name: Stamina
sre_commands.sre.stamina.desc: Add to or set a player's sprint stamina value.
sre_commands.sre.inventory.name: View Inventory
sre_commands.sre.inventory.desc: Open a GUI to view a target player's inventory.
sre_commands.sre.invsee.name: View Inventory (alias)
sre_commands.sre.invsee.desc: Alias of /sre:inventory; open a GUI to view a target player's inventory.
sre_commands.sre.monitor.name: Security Monitor
sre_commands.sre.monitor.desc: Search for and configure security camera positions near a block.
sre_commands.sre.vote.name: Vote System
sre_commands.sre.vote.desc: Full in-game voting system: build options (player/text/item), start, pause, resume, stop and read results.
sre_commands.sre.reloadroleconfig.name: Reload Role Config
sre_commands.sre.reloadroleconfig.desc: Reload all custom role configurations and resync them to clients.
sre_commands.sre.area_manager.name: Area Manager
sre_commands.sre.area_manager.desc: Manage per-map area configuration: spawns, regions, environment, rooms; set/get/save/load/import map data.
sre_commands.sre.pass.name: Pass / Faction Card
sre_commands.sre.pass.desc: Activate a faction card / progression pass.
sre_commands.sre.roster.name: Role Roster
sre_commands.sre.roster.desc: Open the role-rotation roster; admins can edit, enable, disable, randomize and check status.
sre_commands.sre.scene.name: Scene Manager
sre_commands.sre.scene.desc: Manage scenery assets and scene configuration.
sre_commands.sre.camera.name: Advanced Camera
sre_commands.sre.camera.desc: Advanced camera control for cinematics and spectating.
sre_commands.sre.subtitle.name: Subtitle
sre_commands.sre.subtitle.desc: Display on-screen subtitles positioned at center, top or bottom.
sre_commands.sre.eggclear.name: Clear Cuckoo Eggs
sre_commands.sre.eggclear.desc: Clear cuckoo egg entities within the given range.
sre_commands.sre.infected.name: Infected
sre_commands.sre.infected.desc: Set the infection state duration (in ticks) for a player.
sre_commands.sre.helium.name: Helium Voice
sre_commands.sre.helium.desc: Apply a helium voice-change effect to a player for an optional duration.
sre_commands.tmm.game.visual.name: Visual Effects
sre_commands.tmm.game.visual.desc: Toggle snow, sand, fog, HUD, set train speed and time of day, or reset all visuals.
sre_commands.tmm.game.time.name: Game Timer
sre_commands.tmm.game.time.desc: Get or set the game countdown timer.
sre_commands.tmm.game.penalty.name: Death Penalty
sre_commands.tmm.game.penalty.desc: Start or stop the death penalty, optionally bound to an entity or position.
sre_commands.tmm.game.bounds.name: Boundaries
sre_commands.tmm.game.bounds.desc: Toggle whether players are confined within the play boundaries.
sre_commands.tmm.game.role.name: Role Management
sre_commands.tmm.game.role.desc: In-game role utilities: silent change, send welcome, sync roles, run/remove assignment events.
sre_commands.tmm.game.murder_time.name: Murder Time Events
sre_commands.tmm.game.murder_time.desc: Random timed-event system for Murder mode: manage events, HUD, defaults and triggers.
sre_commands.tmm.game.tests.name: Test Tools
sre_commands.tmm.game.tests.desc: Test role mechanics such as prayer, gambler draw/miracle, and math.
sre_commands.tmm.game.tasks.name: Task Queue
sre_commands.tmm.game.tasks.desc: Clear or cancel queued/listed server tasks.
sre_commands.tmm.game.win.name: Trigger Win
sre_commands.tmm.game.win.desc: Manually trigger a win condition, optionally with a custom color or fully custom text.
sre_commands.tmm.game.reset.name: Reset Map
sre_commands.tmm.game.reset.desc: Reset map blocks (from backup or simple) and clear entities.
sre_commands.tmm.game.scan.name: Scan Map
sre_commands.tmm.game.scan.desc: Scan and update map data such as reset points and task points.
sre_commands.tmm.game.blackout.name: Blackout
sre_commands.tmm.game.blackout.desc: Trigger or stop the full-map blackout effect.
sre_commands.tmm.game.monitor_broken.des: Trigger or stop the broken security-monitor effect.
sre_commands.tmm.game.psycho.name: Psycho Effect
sre_commands.tmm.game.psycho.desc: Trigger or stop the psychological screen effect.
sre_commands.tmm.game.body.name: Body
sre_commands.tmm.game.body.desc: Spawn a corpse or run a command as a body.
sre_commands.tmm.game.revive.name: Revive
sre_commands.tmm.game.revive.desc: Revive a player to their body location or a chosen position.
sre_commands.tmm.game.kill.name: Kill Player
sre_commands.tmm.game.kill.desc: Kill a player with a specified death reason, optional killer, body spawn and force flag.
sre_commands.tmm.game.timestop.name: Time Stop
sre_commands.tmm.game.timestop.desc: Start or stop a global time-stop effect with a message.
sre_commands.changerole.name: Change Role
sre_commands.changerole.desc: Change a player's role, with control over replay recording and stat counting.
sre_commands.changemodifier.name: Change Modifier
sre_commands.changemodifier.desc: Add, remove or toggle a modifier on a player.
sre_commands.forcerole.name: Force Role
sre_commands.forcerole.desc: Force-assign a role to a player for the next assignment.
sre_commands.forcemodifier.name: Force Modifier
sre_commands.forcemodifier.desc: Force-assign a modifier to a player.
sre_commands.setrolecount.name: Set Role Count
sre_commands.setrolecount.desc: Override the auto-calculated count of killers/detectives/neutrals, or reset to auto.
sre_commands.setroleweight.name: Set Role Weight
sre_commands.setroleweight.desc: Set the spawn weight of a role type.
sre_commands.myroleweight.name: My Role Weight
sre_commands.playerroleweight.name: Player Role Weight
sre_commands.playerroleweight.desc: Get or set a specific player's per-role weights.
sre_commands.togglecustomroleweights.des: Enable or disable the custom role weighting system.
sre_commands.setoccupationrole.name: Set Occupation Role
sre_commands.setoccupationrole.desc: Set a paired spawn relationship between two roles.
sre_commands.setenabledrole.name: Set Enabled Role
sre_commands.setenabledrole.desc: Enable or disable roles for the current game (enableAll/disableAll/per role).
sre_commands.setenabledmodifier.name: Set Enabled Modifier
sre_commands.setenabledmodifier.desc: Enable or disable modifiers for the current game (enableAll/disableAll/per modifier).
sre_commands.setcompanionrole.name: Set Companion Role
sre_commands.setcompanionrole.desc: Bind a primary role to a companion role for paired spawning.
sre_commands.listroles.name: List Roles
sre_commands.managerolesui.name: Manage Roles UI
sre_commands.managerolesui.desc: Open the role-management GUI and view role/modifier details.
sre_commands.broadcast.name: Broadcast
sre_commands.broadcast.desc: Broadcast a formatted message to all players.
sre_commands.noellesroles.preset.name: Role Preset
sre_commands.noellesroles.preset.desc: Save and apply role configuration presets: apply, list, create, delete, save.
sre_commands.noellesroles.setmax.name: Set Role Max
sre_commands.noellesroles.setmax.desc: Set the maximum number of a role allowed per game.
sre_commands.room.name: Room
sre_commands.room.desc: Manage train room assignment for players.
sre_commands.stuck.name: Stuck
sre_commands.stuck.desc: Teleport to a safe spot when stuck inside blocks.
sre_commands.vt_mode.name: VTuber Mode
sre_commands.vt_mode.desc: Toggle VTuber (streamer) mode for yourself or a player.
sre_commands.nr_free_cam.name: Free Cam
sre_commands.nr_free_cam.desc: Exit the death penalty and return to spectator free camera.
sre_commands.displayitem.name: Display Item
sre_commands.displayitem.desc: Show the held item's info in chat.
sre_commands.cooldown.name: Cooldown
sre_commands.cooldown.desc: Set an item's ability cooldown time for a player.
sre_commands.item.name: Extra Items
sre_commands.item.desc: Manage a player's extra item slots: add, set, get, remove.
sre_commands.goods.add.name: Add Goods
sre_commands.goods.add.desc: Add a vending-machine item at a position and slot, with an optional price.
sre_commands.goods.remove.name: Remove Goods
sre_commands.goods.remove.desc: Remove a vending-machine item at a position and slot.
sre_commands.goods.list.name: List Goods
sre_commands.goods.list.desc: List the goods configured at a position.
sre_commands.repairshop.name: Repair Shop
sre_commands.repairshop.desc: Open the repair-mode shop management screen.
sre_commands.repair.name: Repair Start
sre_commands.repair.desc: Start repair mode for an optional number of minutes.
sre_commands.repairrole.name: Repair Roles
sre_commands.repairrole.desc: Manage repair-mode role assignment: force, clear, unlock.
sre_commands.repairmap.name: Repair Map
sre_commands.repairmap.desc: Manage repair-mode map data: maintenance locks and escape points (add/remove/list).
sre_commands.repairpreset.name: Repair Preset
sre_commands.nametag.add.name: Add Name Tag
sre_commands.nametag.add.desc: Add a custom name tag to a player.
sre_commands.nametag.remove.name: Remove Name Tag
sre_commands.nametag.remove.desc: Remove a specific name tag from a player.
sre_commands.nametag.set.name: Set Name Tag
sre_commands.nametag.set.desc: Set a player's active name tag, replacing existing ones.
sre_commands.nametag.get.name: Get Name Tag
sre_commands.nametag.list.name: List Name Tags
sre_commands.nametag.list.desc: List all of a player's name tags.
sre_commands.nametag.clear.name: Clear Name Tags
sre_commands.nametag.clear.desc: Clear all of a player's name tags.
sre_commands.nametag.sync.name: Sync Name Tags
sre_commands.nametag.sync.desc: Sync a player's name tags to all clients.
sre_commands.mw.reload.name: Reload Whitelist
sre_commands.mw.maxplayers.name: Max Players
sre_commands.mw.maxplayers.desc: Get or set the server's maximum player count.
sre_commands.sre.client.name: Client Settings
sre_commands.sre.client.desc: Client-side command for local settings, screens and config (runs on the client only).
sre_commands.sreclient.scene.name: Client Scene
sre_commands.sreclient.scene.desc: Client-side scenery asset command (runs on the client only).
sre_commands.kill.name: Kill (overwritten)
sre_commands.kill.desc: Vanilla /kill overwritten by mixin: players need permission 3, command blocks need 2.
